Choose exactly which folders get backed up, plus a rename.

## Added
- **Backup folder selection (per container).** Each container's row now has a "Backup folders" section listing all of the container's mapped (bind) folders. The appdata folder is selected by default; tick any other mapped folder to include it, or add a custom path under the host mount. Folders that are not under the host mount are shown but cannot be selected. Unticking everything reverts to the automatic appdata default. Previously only appdata was backed up. The selection is preserved across backups and used for restore.

## Changed
- **"Jobs" is now called "Plans"** in the sidebar and the page heading.

Image: `ghcr.io/junkerderprovinz/bombvault:1.5.0` (also `:1`, `:1.5`, `:latest`), multi-arch (amd64 + arm64).
